column1: # Tighten one rule at a time as the target hardens — every IGNORE here is a
# conscious accepted risk and should be revisited each quarter.

column3: Incomplete or no Cache-control headers — acceptable on demo target
Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments — demo data only
Timestamp Disclosure — public demo target uses real timestamps
Modern Web Application — false-positive on JSON-only API
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens — warn so we track without blocking
